Salindrite Dagger  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 13
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 STA: +10 HP: +50 ENDUR: +25
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Thunder Strike (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 49
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG BRD ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Nobles

Mob Graveyard
North Ro
Available as a drop from Ventani the Warder in Sleeper's Tomb on progression servers before The Sleeper is awoken.

QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2004 at 9:02 AM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
Not an agro problem~
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2004 at 4:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592761686611
1 post
65 Ranger, and I very rarely have any agro issues with this dagger. What people dont realize is that mobs in BoT and most LDoN mobs are all resistant to the stun portion of the spell... therefore you get the dd action and not the stun... The only times I do have agro problems is when a) the tank is poor or b) it procs 4 or 5 times back to back.. auto off for a couple seconds and you are gtg.. Anyways, Im currently taking offers on this dagger on 7th Hammer. I have an upgrade and could use the cash. If you are interested, let me know~
▲ Page top
RE: Not an agro problem~
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2004 at 7:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591760931097
109 posts
Resisted stuns DO generate aggro. Any warrior with a weapon that has a stun proc knows this, and there are now several weapons out there with stun procs (Great Blade of Storms, Sword of the Bloodsworn, Copper Hammer of Striking are just a few examples that warriors frequently use).

Just like any spell that is resisted can generate aggro. If you don't believe that, ask a ranger or druid about resisted snare, or a shammy or chanter about resisted slow.
▲ Page top
RE: Not an agro problem~
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2004 at 8:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760228035
287 posts
you must take into consideration that some stuns have a Max level. Stuns that proc on a monster above the max level does not cause agro. At least not from my experience.
▲ Page top
RE: Not an agro problem~
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2013 at 12:20 PM Rating: Default
LoafyRaisinswirl
153 posts
Old post, but no thats completely wrong. still gets aggro.
▲ Page top
SOD/DAGGER
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2004 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798273108
24 posts
I HAVE BOWTH THIS DAGGER AND sOd...but i am on a zek sever ,what i really would like to know is 'does the proc remotly help you pvp or ,being a pvp server ,does the average mr ,tends to be high, usually win out on the proc ?


Edited, Mon Feb 16 10:23:13 2004
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 08 2003 at 8:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I agree this items LOOKS fantastic. 13/18 and 263 DMG proc. but most people forget the stun component in this spell. did you ever try to nuke with your enchanter spells? those also have this 0.0 sec stun in them and give massive aggro JUST BECAUSE OF THE STUN.
RE: to be uber or not to be uber
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2003 at 9:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793027949
2 posts
oh and I just saw that this spell is the level 29 wizard spell which knocks your target back. other melees will hate you for doing so. I remember when I used this spell with my wizard and people kept yelling at me to stop that ****. almost as bad as grav flux.
▲ Page top
RE: to be uber or not to be uber
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2003 at 1:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769227145
18 posts
I got this tonight with my bard. It proc's somewhat frequently but I have not noticed an aggro problem. I have yet to use it in a normal group, just in raids. It owns though, like the bard/rog/ranger version of SoD ... I'm thrileld :)

Isabeau d'Anjou

Officer, Prime Syndicate

__DEL__1591769229363

Well this would certainly be tight for a rogue and a ranger... But think it’s the best for a bard... Hmm, Bard have uber haste songs, and we bards also tend to have high dexterity, *hint* *hint* ... Not to mention, the hate list reducing songs, or fear kiting, to make the extra agro no big deal!

I want one :) Drool

Correction
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2003 at 11:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362394197
1 post
Just got this Dagger today on RZ.
It's 13/18, NOT 11/18.

Using this main hand and Horn of Hsagra off hand.
Very fast damage but it's only doing ,on average, 40ish damage.

Works great fear kiting animals. Snare/fear, do massive amounts of damage ^_^

Burning Desire
